problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
